base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of msx_enemies_field_set — a character from 1986 dragon quest. MSX field enemies — overworld random encounters: slime/redslime/drakee/wyvern/droll/ghost/magician/golem variants. 410×483 RGBA canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: MSX field enemies — overworld random encounters: slime/redslime/drakee/wyvern/droll/ghost/magician/golem variants. 410×483 RGBA canvas
